forum.command: forum route "Project Telos formal replay next pass: explicit finite edge/operator vocabulary over the typed finite-grid summation-by-parts Lean replay, with Gather source demotion, Crucible package-boundary receipt, Learn prooflesson, and Navier-Stokes parent claim kept UNVERIFIABLE" --json

boundary: Routing and context envelopes select the local substrate for this pass. They do not prove the theorem, source-body truth, or any Navier-Stokes parent claim.
